payload.name: Ornery Service-Bot
payload.description: A squat, rectangular maintenance droid with a single glowing eye-sensor and two articulating claw-arms. It is currently blocking the path northwest, its chassis vibrating with a low, menacing hum. A speaker grill on its front emits a series of aggressive squawks and digital hisses whenever you approach.

properties.takeRefusal: The bot clamps its treads to the floor and makes a very alarming 'REDACTED' sound.

payload.name: Vial of Joy Concentrate
payload.description: A small glass vial filled with a thick, iridescent blue liquid. The label features a logo of a smiling person surrounded by bubbles and the words: 'JOY CONCENTRATE - REFILL FOR ALL AERATED COALITION DISPENSERS.'

properties.shortDescription: a vial of iridescent blue fluid

priorState.name: The Weaving District
priorState.description: A narrower street leads toward a section draped in thousands of swaying, multi-colored strands.

exit.destinationIntent: A residential and artisanal area focused on textiles and vertical living, filled with rope bridges and hanging looms.

exit.destinationIntent: A residential and artisanal area focused on textiles and vertical living, filled with rope bridges and hanging looms.

payload.name: The Weaving District
payload.description: A labyrinth of suspended walkways, bridges of braided cable, and hanging dwellings. Everywhere you look, long strands of colored fiber sway in the artificial breeze, some being worked by clattering automated looms. The air is thick with the scent of dyed wool and machine oil.

payload.name: Market Archway
payload.description: The way back to the main market area.
